nasb.text: The wilderness and the desert will be glad, And the Arabah will rejoice and blossom; Like the crocus

esv.text: The wilderness and the dry land shall be glad; the desert shall rejoice and blossom like the crocus;

cnv.text: 曠野和乾旱之地必歡喜； 沙漠要快樂， 又像番紅花一般開花，

ccb.text: 沙漠和干旱之地必欢喜； 旷野必快乐，开满鲜花，

csbs.text: 旷野和干旱之地必欢喜； 荒漠必快乐，如番红花绽放，
